# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

admin_listen = 0.0.0.0:8001
proxy_listen = 0.0.0.0:8000
database = postgres
pg_host = postgres
pg_port = 5432
pg_database = kong
pg_user = kong
pg_password = kong
pg_ssl = off
pg_ssl_verify = off
prefix = /usr/local/kong/
nginx_worker_processes = auto
nginx_worker_connections = 16384
nginx_resolver = 8.8.8.8 8.8.4.4
nginx_http_gzip = on
nginx_http_gzip_min_length = 1024
nginx_http_gzip_comp_level = 5
nginx_http_gzip_types = application/atom+xml application/javascript application/json application/ld+json application/manifest+json application/rss+xml application/vnd.api+json application/vnd.ms-fontobject application/x-font-ttf application/x-web-app-manifest+json application/xhtml+xml application/xml font/opentype image/bmp image/svg+xml image/x-icon text/cache-manifest text/css text/javascript text/plain text/xml

nginx_http_gzip_vary = on
nginx_http_gzip_disable = msie6
nginx_http_gzip_static = on
nginx_http_gzip_http_version = 1.1
nginx_http_gzip_buffer_size = 4k
nginx_http_gzip_proxied = any
